_doc: Portfolio config. Edit this file only - the site reads everything from here.

profile.bioRu: Senior Unity разработчик. Создаю PC и мобильные игры, а также промышленные симуляции - от прототипа до релиза. Пишу код, который работает под нагрузкой, выглядит чисто и не ломается в 3 ночи перед дедлайном.
profile.bioEn: Senior Unity Developer. I build PC and mobile games as well as industrial simulations - from prototype to release. I write code that holds up under pressure, stays clean, and doesn't break at 3am before a deadline.

projects._comment: Preset 'no-links' - display only, nothing is clickable

projects.descEn: VR emergency drill simulator for industrial facilities. NDA - links unavailable.

projects.descEn: Open-world PC game with procedural level generation built in Unity 6.

projects.descEn: Hyper-casual mobile game with 500k+ downloads, optimized for low-end devices.

projects.descEn: Industrial production line simulation for operator training in VR.

projects.descEn: Mobile RPG with an underwater setting, crafting system, and Photon multiplayer.
